creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
My bad, I have this patch in my tree for quite a while
(around July or August) when I was doing some tests on RPI
and through it's the same project.

The issue I had is parpd doesn't work properly on RPI, if
I remember well, it doesn't start.

Sorry for the noise, I think I can close this PR and start
investigation on the issue :(
